text: Here, I am surrounded by an air of deliberate curiosity—an environment where glass walls both separate and invite, creating both boundaries and transparency. The angled view unsettles me, as if asking me to question the usual order of things. Stepping further, the R+D display evokes a sense of anticipation and wonder at the progress of collective thought. The spirited encouragement to innovate and reflect on our coexistence with machines fills me with cautious optimism, yet also a humble awareness of how much is yet unknown and unexplored. I feel like an observer at the threshold of discovery, urged to participate, to question, and to co-create meaning.
